items.example: AI can improve productivity. However, it may create new risks.
items.fadingVisible: AI can improve productivity. However, it may create new risks.
items.fadingFaint: AI can improve productivity. (however) it may create new risks.
items.fadingHidden: AI can improve productivity. It may create new risks.

items.example: Sleep improves memory. Therefore, students should value sleep.
items.fadingVisible: Sleep improves memory. Therefore, students should value sleep.
items.fadingFaint: Sleep improves memory. (therefore) students should value sleep.
items.fadingHidden: Sleep improves memory. Students should value sleep.

items.example: She stayed home because she was sick.
items.fadingVisible: She stayed home because she was sick.
items.fadingFaint: She stayed home (because) she was sick.
items.fadingHidden: She was sick. She stayed home.

items.example: Many animals migrate. For example, some birds travel thousands of kilometers.
items.fadingVisible: Many animals migrate. For example, some birds travel thousands of kilometers.
items.fadingFaint: Many animals migrate. (for example) some birds travel thousands of kilometers.
items.fadingHidden: Many animals migrate. Some birds travel thousands of kilometers.

items.example: According to the report, renewable energy use is increasing.
items.fadingVisible: According to the report, renewable energy use is increasing.
items.fadingFaint: (According to the report), renewable energy use is increasing.
items.fadingHidden: The report says renewable energy use is increasing.

items.example: We need to consider both the benefits and the risks.
items.fadingVisible: We need to consider both the benefits and the risks.
items.fadingFaint: We need to (consider) both the benefits and the risks.
items.fadingHidden: There are benefits and risks. We need to make a judgment.

items.example: Scientists define biodiversity as the variety of life in an ecosystem.
items.fadingVisible: Scientists define biodiversity as the variety of life in an ecosystem.
items.fadingFaint: Scientists (define) biodiversity as the variety of life in an ecosystem.
items.fadingHidden: Biodiversity means the variety of life in an ecosystem.
